title: Moderation Summary — 2026-04-29
body:
6 reports processed:

**Bans (2):**
• spam_wave_42 — Phishing links posted across 6 channels
• toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment of newcomers

**Warnings (1):**
• bot_like_user_77 — Near-identical automated replies in help channels

**Closed — No Action (3):**
• report_003 (trusted_helper) — Dispute, not abuse. Trusted member protected.
• report_004 (new_member_17) — Low-severity formatting issue
• report_006 (core_maintainer) — False positive from brigading after moderation decision. Trusted member protected.
